# `/allowlist` Command
Manages the server allowlist.

<table>
  <tr>
    <th>Aliases</th>
    <td>/whitelist</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Permission Level</th>
    <td>Owner</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Requires Cheats?</th>
    <td>Yes</td>
  </tr>
</table>

## Usage
### `/allowlist <action: AllowListAction> [name: string]`

## Arguments
- `action`: AllowListAction
- `name`: string

## Enums
### `AllowListAction`

#### Values
- `add`
- `remove`
- `list`
- `reload`
- `on`
- `off`
